# SMB Strategy Consultants
> We help ambitious business owners win in an AI-transformed world. AI implementation, financial clarity, and practical strategy for owner-led service firms.

SMB Strategy Consultants (SMBSC) is an AI implementation and business strategy firm based in Atlanta, GA. Founded by Corbin Cook. We work with owner-led service businesses — typically $500K–$5M revenue — who want to implement AI practically, clarify their financial position, and break owner dependency. Core offer is the AI Implementation Strategy engagement ($4,997). We diagnose the constraint first, then install the right system.

## Pages

- /: Home — overview of the firm, primary CTA to book a free strategy call
- /services: All Solutions — full menu of strategy intensives
- /how-it-works: How It Works — the constraint-first methodology
- /who-its-for: Who It's For — ideal client profile, owner-led service businesses
- /about: About — Corbin Cook's background and firm philosophy
- /strategy-call: Free Strategy Call — book a no-cost AI implementation strategy call
- /financial-clarity-intensive: Financial Clarity Intensive — financial systems and clarity for SMB owners
- /growth-systems-intensive: Growth Systems Intensive — scalable sales and marketing systems
- /owner-dependency-intensive: Owner Dependency Intensive — remove the owner bottleneck
- /ai-operations-intensive: AI Operations Intensive — practical AI implementation for service businesses
- /blog: Insights — articles on AI, business strategy, and growth for SMB owners
- /blog/show-rate-predicts-close-rate: Article — show rate as a leading sales indicator
- /blog/why-ai-implementation-fails-small-business: Article — why AI fails in SMBs and how to avoid it
- /blog/owner-dependency-ai-implementation: Article — breaking owner dependency through AI

- /why-ai-fails: Why AI Fails — common failure modes and SMBSC's diagnostic approach
- /ai-readiness-assessment: AI Readiness Assessment — self-assessment tool for SMB owners
- /implementation-stories: Implementation Stories — client case studies and results
